title: KutaKuta 2 Pcs Pet Hair Remover Gloves, Double-Sided Pet Grooming Gloves, Static Removal Gloves Pet Hair, Dog Washing Gloves, Versatile Cat Grooming Glove for Washing/Deshedding/Grooming
features: Double-Sided Grooming Gloves: Our cat grooming gloves are specially made for your pet partner, considering that your pet friend will have strong hair, we have adopted a double-sided design, using our pet hair remover can remove floating hair through both sides, improve the cleaning effect.

Comfortable Fit: Our double-sided dog grooming gloves are designed with stretchy, breathable material that ensures a snug yet flexible fit on your hand. Cat hair removers are lightweight and comfortable, providing a breathable and easy-to-wear experience during grooming sessions.

Anti-Static Design: These pet grooming gloves allow you to gently rub your pet without causing any damage to their skin. You can clean your pet friends effortlessly and keep their hair fresh and comfortable.

Versatile Grooming Tool: Grooming gloves for dogs allow you to gently wipe your pet without causing any harm to their skin. Dog hair remover helps remove dirt and loose hair, dog washing gloves making your pets comfortable while also achieving cleanliness.
Wide Range of Applications: Suitable for cats, dogs, rabbits, and other pets of all sizes and hair lengths, these cat gloves provide an efficient and gentle grooming experience.
description: Product description Feature 1. Double-sided design to remove loose hair and improve cleaning efficiency, ideal for pets with thick fur. 2. Stretchy and breathable material ensures a snug yet flexible fit, providing a comfortable and easy-to-wear experience during grooming sessions. 3. Allows gentle rubbing without damaging your pet's skin, removing loose hair effortlessly and keeping the coat fresh. Promotes bonding between you and your pet. 4. Suitable for cats, dogs, rabbits, and other pets of all sizes and hair lengths. Specifications: Name: Static Removal Gloves Pet Hair Material: Fabric Color: Black Total size of : 25cm x 17cm x 2cm Package includes: 2*Pet Hair Remover Gloves Note: 1.
